agentAbility.name: Rampage
agentAbility.description: Brings on a destructive rage, firing faster and surviving any hit with at least 1 HP.

agentTrait.name: Scavenger
agentTrait.description: Destroying enemy vehicles makes them drop Scrap Tokens, which can be picked up for temporary HP.

primaryAttack.name: Autoloader
primaryAttack.description: Loads a magazine which can rapidly fire, followed by a longer reload. Most effective at close range.

tankAbilities.name: Pyro-Trail
tankAbilities.description: Forces the vehicle forward at high speed, leaving a burning trail that ignites enemies and terrain.

tankAbilities.name: Rocket Barrage
tankAbilities.description: Unleashes a salvo of high-explosive rockets that damage and Slow enemies.
